content: Agent-Orchestrated Answering Ensembles can be augmented by embedding an ICM curiosity mechanism to dynamically re-orchestrate the agent ensemble when existing specialized agents collectively produce low-curiosity (overly familiar, redundant) outputs, instead of only orchestrating based on task type or static routing rules. This creates a self-improving cycle where the ensemble actively pursues novel, unaddressed angles of a user query that pre-specialized agents would otherwise miss.
